title: View Descriptor Protocol (VDP) v0.1 Discovery Document
description: Schema for the VDP discovery document served at /.well-known/vdp as application/vdp-discovery+json (spec Section 13.2). Unrecognized members are permitted everywhere per the discovery extensibility clause: clients MUST ignore members they do not recognize.

version.description: The VDP protocol version supported by the API (e.g. "0.1"). Matches the value advertised by the VDP-Version header.

endpoints.description: Maps API paths to their view descriptor resources. Keys are absolute paths relative to the origin serving the discovery document, and MAY be RFC 6570 Level 1 URI Templates (e.g. /api/products/{id}).

trustedTemplateUrls.description: Template URL allowlist (spec Section 10). Each entry is a URL prefix; entries SHOULD end with a trailing slash.

EndpointEntry.description: Discovery metadata for one API endpoint. Additional members are permitted for extensibility.

descriptor.description: URL of the endpoint's view descriptor resource. MAY be a relative reference, resolved against the discovery document URL per RFC 3986.
